scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM agent frameworks, browser automation agents, tool calling, graph/state runtimes, hosted or sandbox execution, MCP, CLIs, and production agent operations.
scenarios.role: Work on the LangChain Python monorepo: package routing, core primitives, v1 agents and middleware, classic APIs, partner integrations, standard tests, model profiles, and safe validation workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `langchain` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: agents and middleware, classic chains, core primitives, integrations, monorepo development, and testing and profiles.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `langchain` when the request names `langchain`, centers on Work on the LangChain Python monorepo: package routing, core primitives, v1 agents and middleware, classic APIs, partner integrations, standard tests, model profiles, and safe validation workflows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in agent frameworks tooling and sandboxed llm workflows. Then route to agents and middleware, classic chains, core primitives, or integrations when those focused workflows match.
